title: Ukraine will get $105 billion loan after Hungary drops opposition, E.U. says
summary_full: The chief opponent of the loan, Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban, lost his campaign for reelection this month.
summary_public: The chief opponent of the loan, Hungarian Prime Minister Viktor Orban, lost his campaign for reelection this month.
